import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn abs_int(_ v: Int) -> Int
  if v < 0
    -v
  else
    v
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut best: Option<Int> = None
  mut best_abs = 0

  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut j = i
      while j < n and not is_ws(line, j)
        j = j + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        let a = abs_int(v)
        match best
        when None
          best = Some(v)
          best_abs = a
        when Some(_)
          if a < best_abs
            best = Some(v)
            best_abs = a
          end
        end
      when None
        print("parse error")
      end
      i = j
    end
  end

  match best
  when Some(v)
    print("min_abs=#{v}")
  when None
    print("min_abs=0")
  end
end
